events.description: The student grabs the wrong toolbox.
events.vlm_observation: The person is reaching for a red toolbox on the left side, but the circuit breaker components are in the toolbox on the right.

events.description: The student grabs the circuit breaker.
events.vlm_observation: The person is now holding the correct circuit breaker component in their right hand.

events.description: The student turns on the circuit breaker box.
events.vlm_observation: The switch on the breaker box is now in the ON position.

events.description: No activity detected for ~7 seconds between steps 2 and 3.
events.vlm_observation: The person's hands are stationary and no task-related movement is visible.
